title: KaizoMC
description: Making Minecraft extremely difficult while keeping the Vanilla feel
body:
# kaizomc Making Minecraft insanely hard
## Features
Click here for a list of all features (spoiler alert!) - Custom advancements - All mobs have double HP - Limited crafting and other difficulty-enhancing game rules are enabled - Creepers explode instantly - You can't sleep - Eyes of Ender are way harder to craft and always break upon being thrown - Harder crafting recipes for special items - Mobs don't burn during the daytime - Mobs don't take damage to water - Every mob is angered at you by default - Endermen pick up all blocks (except for air) - Difficulty is locked on Hardcore - Skulk Shriekers spawn a Warden instantly when activated - Every item has only half of its original durability - Totems of Undying are unobtainable in Survival This mod is available in both English and German.
## Requirements This mod requires both the latest version of the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) and the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## Credits
The custom advancements would not have been possible without the following Minecraft accounts - MHF_Villager - MHF_EGuardian - MHF_Enderman - MHF_Golem - MHF_Warden - Nelson540
## License This mod is licensed under the [MIT License](https://codeberg.org/Niitroo/kaizomc/raw/branch/1.21.11/LICENSE).
